bird.name: 山蓝鸭
bird.summary: 山鸭（台湾作山藍鴨）（学名：Hymenolaimus malacorhynchos；英语：Blue Duck、Mountain Duck、Blue Mountain Duck；毛利语：Whio）是鸭科山藍鴨屬（Hymenolaimus）的唯一一种生物，仅见于新西兰，新西兰十元纸…

locations.name: Akatarawa Valley
locations.summary: The Akatarawa Valley is a valley in the Tararua Range of New Zealand's North Island.
